app.name: إطعام
app.description: A charitable platform connecting surplus food to those in need

home.hero_subtitle: ﴿And they give food, out of love for Him, to the needy, the orphan, and the prisoner. We feed you only for the face of Allah. We want from you neither reward nor thanks.﴾ — Surah Al-Insan 76:8-9
home.step_1_desc: "Or [there is] a donation of food in a day of severe hunger, an orphan of close relation, or a needy person in misery." — Surah Al-Balad 90:14-16
home.step_2_desc: Browse available donations and reserve what you need.
home.step_3_desc: Meet at pickup location and verify with your secret code. No personal details are exchanged.
home.support_desc: "And in their wealth there is a right due to the seeker and the deprived." — Surah Al-Zariyat 51:19

hadith.feed_believer: Whoever feeds a believer until they are satiated, Allah will admit them through a gate of Paradise.
hadith.neighbor: By Allah, he does not believe! By Allah, he does not believe! By Allah, he does not believe! It was said: Who is that, O Messenger of Allah? He said: "One whose neighbor is hungry beside him."
hadith.peace_food: O people, spread peace, feed food, and pray at night while people sleep, and you will enter Paradise in peace.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to participate in charitable work
auth.register_subtitle: Be part of the mercy of feeding the hungry
auth.name: Full Name

donations.title: Donations
donations.no_donations: No donations available at the moment
